title: Midnight Craving Light Floral Uruguayan White Bread Fry
description: A flavorful, light, and refreshing Uruguayan-inspired dish, perfect for a midnight craving, featuring white bread and fry, made with anti-inflammatory-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: 1 cup white bread, cut into 1-inch cubes

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and saut 5; until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the bread cubes and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced avocado and cook until heated through, about 1-2 minutes.
Add the chopped parsley, scallions, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Using a slotted spoon, transfer the bread mixture to a plate and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the beaten egg and cook until set, about 1-2 minutes.
Add the panko breadcrumbs and grated Parmesan cheese, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked bread mixture back into the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the mixture is crispy and golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro, if desired.
